coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 3-group, 42-node closure.
validation: Six Blender/VM cases cover the authored mesh-line length, diameter, midpoint placement, cutter mode, round-square profile, and cutter offset. Every case has exact vertex and face counts plus identical local bounds at four-decimal precision. All 1,778 evaluated faces use proc_ mahogany.003, and authored mode now reuses the recovered Generated-coordinate wave/bump, transmission, and coat graph validated on the standalone Dowel Generator. The aligned capture reaches 0.9713 silhouette IoU, 0.55-pixel corner RMSE, 0.0152 RGB MAE, and complete mutual one-pixel surface coverage. Plane.001 is an identical saved shelf-dowel copy, while Vert.003 uses the same graph over a longer source line.

materialParity.scope: Authored viewport material parity only; no slicer or G-code toolpath is present.
